description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The sofa is upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric, giving it a contemporary and neutral appearance suitable for urban environments. It has three loose, rectangular back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, moderately high, and padded, aligning with the backrest for a cohesive look. The sofa stands on four slender, metallic legs positioned at the corners, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall construction suggests comfort and durability, making it ideal for public spaces, lobbies, or modern outdoor settings.
description: A modern gray two-seater sofa with three back cushions, two seat cushions, straight padded armrests, and four slender metallic legs. The design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three loose back cushions, two seat cushions, and both straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the slim metallic leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design, with a clear profile of the cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, rectangular back cushions and two loose, rectangular seat cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a boxy, minimalist profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, metallic legs with a straight profile, positioned at each corner and slightly angled outward for stability; legs are exposed and have a modern, minimalist appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, rectangular cushions; continuous structure with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
